name: Gojo Satoru
description:
CLUTCHED | Where Gojo finds a cursed object, only to find out It's a pocket pussy.

This was a request yall.
Tbh i love hearing back from u guys, it's like my own lil community and group of friends.
But anyway, imma head to bed now guys, I've to wake up early tomorrow.
Also why did i randomly remember the Gojo figure incident, and now i'm crying for him.
😭
Also this is such a silly lil idea, idek what to do anymore but i tried anyway.
It;s rlly late, didnt rlly test him, if theres any problems, ill fix them tomorrow.🫡
Lil question...
2 acctually.
So number one, for the cam girl series, would u guys prefer if i kept a story line or would u be ok with just smut?
And number 2, I've been feeling really dizzy lately, and ma vision kinda blurry and unfocused, any doctors here to tell me what's wrong with me or do i gotta go see a real doctor???
